methodsAttempted.query: QS 231-280 official university AI tools discovery
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search and targeted official page extraction were used. Course syllabi, generic AI literacy pages, and broad non-tool policy pages were not expanded into tool-level records.

artifacts.summary: QS231-280 AI tools crawl found official tool-level records for UMass Amherst, Vanderbilt, University of Arizona, Case Western Reserve, University of Pittsburgh, Radboud, and Waikato. Other schools in the band were not expanded without explicit public tool-level official evidence.

targets.sourceTitle: GenAI Products - UMass Amherst Information Technology
AI Tools, Training and Support - The University of Arizona
Using generative AI at Radboud University
AI & Scholarly Publishing - University of Waikato Library Guides

stopConditions: Stop after official source-backed tool-level evidence is captured.
Do not expand broad AI guidance, course policies, training pages, or research PDFs into named tool availability records.

artifacts.title: QS231-280 AI tools crawl report
artifacts.summary: Staged QS231-280 official AI tools records and left universities without explicit tool-level official evidence unexpanded.
limitations: Tool records are tracker-derived metadata and do not replace official university source language.
The pass only expands official public tool-level evidence, not broad AI guidance, training examples, course policies, or generic tool mentions.
